name: AI Voice Receptionist
description: Answers incoming phone calls 24/7, qualifies customers, answers FAQs and books appointments.

name: AI Lead Qualification Agent
description: Qualifies leads automatically, asks discovery questions and routes hot leads to your sales team.

name: AI Customer Support Agent
description: Answers customer questions using your knowledge base across website, WhatsApp and email.

name: AI Appointment Booking Agent
description: Books appointments, manages calendars and sends reminders automatically.

name: AI CRM Automation Agent
description: Updates CRM records, follows up with leads and keeps customer data synchronized.

name: AI Reporting & Analytics Agent
description: Creates automated daily, weekly and monthly reports from multiple business systems.

name: AI Internal Knowledge Agent
description: Acts as an internal company assistant trained on SOPs, documents and company knowledge.

name: AI Email & Follow-up Agent
description: Writes personalized emails, follows up automatically and manages customer conversations.

name: AI Document Processing Agent
description: Extracts information from invoices, forms, PDFs and contracts automatically.

name: Custom AI Automation Solution
description: Tailor-made AI workflow built specifically around the client's business process.
